studyName: METSIM Subcutaneous Adipose Surgical Biopsy RNA-Seq

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BIOPSY_TYPE
variables.description: Type of biopsy

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: Biopsy_Number
variables.description: Biopsy number

variables.name: DELETION_SIZE
variables.description: Median of deletions across reads calculated using RSeQC

variables.name: HAS_GENOTYPE
variables.description: Has genotype available in METSIM parent study

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: INSERTION_SIZE_MEAN_R1R2
variables.description: Median of insertions across reads and mean of read 1 and read 2 calculated using RSeQC

variables.name: IS_DUPLICATE
variables.description: Multiple samples from the same subject collected at the same time

variables.name: IS_LONGITUDINAL_WITHIN
variables.description: Multiple samples from the same subject at different time points within dataset

variables.name: IS_PUBLISHED_N420
variables.description: The sample is included in AdipoExpress publication

variables.name: IS_PUBLISHED_N425
variables.description: The sample is included in Brotman et al. (2023) Diabetes

variables.name: IS_SHARED_FUSION
variables.description: Multiple samples from the same subject with FUSION adipose

variables.name: IS_SHARED_METSIM_NEEDLE
variables.description: Multiple samples from the same subject with METSIM needle biopsies

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: LONGITUDINAL_SAMPLE_NUMBER
variables.description: First or second timepoint when there are multiple samples from the same subject within the dataset

variables.name: RIN
variables.description: RNA integrity number

variables.name: RNA_EXTRACTION_BATCH
variables.description: RNA extraction batch

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SEQUENCING_BATCH
variables.description: RNA-sequencing batch

variables.name: SEQ_BATCH_NAME
variables.description: The name of the Nova-Seq 6000 sequencing batch

tables.description: This subject phenotype table contains subject ID, race, and estimated cell-type proportions from SCDC tree-based approach (n= 11 variables; Adipocyte, Endothelial, Fibroblast, Mast, Preadipocyte, Perivascular, Macrophage, T_naive, T_NK, B, and Neutrophil).
